name: blogs.json
description: A list with metadata of all blogs written in markdown.

blogs.title: Developing a Mobile App from Scratch with Expo and React Native
blogs.description: In this post, I'm sharing my experience of developing a mobile app from scratch and end-to-end - from the initial idea, to the software architecture, the CI/CD strategy and the submission to the app stores.
blogs.bannerAlt: Picture of the Cranny app infront of a bench in a forest
blogs.author: danieljancar

blogs.title: Teaching Scratch in Elbasan 🇦🇱
blogs.description: I joined iStep for a volunteer week in Elbasan, Albania, teaching kids and teenagers their first taste of programming with Scratch. Here is what stayed with me.
blogs.author: danieljancar

blogs.title: Winning The Stellar Dev Challenge Award
blogs.description: What started as a lunchtime idea became VoteVault, our voting app on Stellar. The short video tutorial we made on the side is what ended up winning the Vivid Video Award.
blogs.bannerAlt: AI generated image of a mix between beach and computers.
blogs.author: danieljancar

blogs.title: How to Use Prettier as a Github Action
blogs.description: Prettier is a great tool to format your code. In this article, I will show you how to use Prettier as a Github Action.
blogs.bannerAlt: Image of a website with the Prettier logo and the Github logo, styled in a robot-like way.
blogs.author: danieljancar

blogs.title: Husky - Perfect Git Hook to Reduce Refactoring Efforts
blogs.description: Husky is a great tool to add git hooks to your project. I will show you how to set it up and how it can reduce refactoring efforts.
blogs.bannerAlt: Image of a cartoon husky sitting in front of a coding IDE's.
blogs.author: danieljancar
